issuer_name_as_stated: ICICI Prudential Asset Management Company Limited
extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates matters filed by (“By”) from matters against the relevant parties: I counted only the “Against” rows, namely criminal proceedings of 2 against the Company, 0 against Directors, 473 against Promoters, 0 against KMP and 1 against Senior Management, and statutory/regulatory proceedings of 2, 1, 8, 0 and 0 respectively; tax proceedings counted for the Company and its subsidiaries are 12 against the Company, while promoter tax matters were excluded. The quantified aggregate amount against the Company and subsidiaries is the Company-row amount of ₹1,638.0 million; promoter amounts and all “By” rows were excluded, giving ₹163.80 crore after conversion. The contingent-liabilities table is dated September 30, 2025 and gives line items totaling ₹143.8 million, or ₹14.38 crore, because no stated Total row is provided. No company-wide top-five or top-ten customer concentration percentage is disclosed; the percentages shown concern scheme concentration rather than customers. Litigation and contingent-liability tables use ₹ million, converted to crore by dividing by 10 (₹1 million = ₹0.1 crore).
